Name: Merge Sort
Time Complexity: Average: Θ(N log(N)), Best: Ω(N log(N)), Worst: O(N log(N))

Name: Bubble Sort
Time Complexity: Average: Θ(N^2), Best: Ω(N), Worst: O(N^2)

Name: Selection Sort
Time Complexity: Average: Θ(N^2), Best:  Ω(N^2), Worst: O(N^2)

Name: Insertion Sort
Time Complexity: Average: Θ(N^2), Best: Ω(N), Worst: O(N^2)
